channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Beirut building ablaze after apparent Israeli strike
item.description: A residential building in Beirut was seen with flames erupting from a hole in its side after an apparent Israeli strike.

item.title: Qatar’s foreign minister says ‘regional countries are not an enemy of Iran’
item.description: Mohammed bin Abdulaziz al-Khulaifi also says Qatar and Oman cannot act as mediators while under attack.

item.title: Oil prices swing wildly amid mixed messages over Iran war
item.description: Crude oil prices fall sharply as energy markets remain on tenterhooks over effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: N Korea ‘respects’ Iran’s selection of Mojtaba Khamenei as supreme leader
item.description: North Korean Foreign Ministry spokesperson condemns the US and Israel's 'unlawful military attack against Iran'.

item.title: Bodies recovered after US-Israeli strikes hit Tehran
item.description: Video released by the Iranian Red Crescent show rescue teams retrieving bodies after US-Israeli strikes hit Tehran.

item.title: Iranian women’s football team arrives in Malaysia from Australia
item.description: Members of the Iranian women's soccer team arrived in Malaysia after Australia granted asylum to some players.

item.title: Indian traveller stranded in Qatar takes long road to Riyadh
item.description: Varun Krishnan was flying from Chennai to Barcelona when Iranian attacks stranded him in Doha.

item.title: ‘No endgame’: Why US Democrats say Iran war hearing has them worried
item.description: Lawmakers say the White House has not clearly explained why the US entered the conflict, or how long it may last.

item.title: Australia grants asylum to 2 more members of Iranian women’s football team
item.description: Australia's home affairs minister says a total of seven members of the Iranian women's team have been granted asylum.

item.title: Iran launches wave of heavy, multi-warhead missiles
item.description: The Iranian military released footage of missile launches from what it described as a wave multi-warhead projectiles.
